checks.name: external_prez_view_safety
checks.description: ExternalPrezViewActions on Presentation only if principal in resource.viewers OR principal in resource.viewerTeams OR resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorTeams (since PrezEditActions is a superset containing these actions)

checks.name: duplicate_presentation_safety
checks.description: duplicatePresentation only if (internal AND in viewers) OR owner OR in editors OR in editorTeams

checks.name: edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: editPresentation only if owner OR in editors OR in editorTeams

checks.name: grant_view_prez_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation only if (owner OR editors OR editorTeams) AND customer sharing restriction respected

checks.name: grant_edit_prez_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation only if (owner OR editors OR editorTeams) AND target is internal

checks.name: remove_self_prez_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromPresentation accessible via external view (viewers/viewerTeams), internal view (internal+viewers), or edit (owner/editors/editorTeams)

checks.name: view_template_safety
checks.description: viewTemplate only if (in viewerMarkets) OR (internal AND in viewers) OR (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets)

checks.name: duplicate_template_safety
checks.description: duplicateTemplate same as viewTemplate ceiling

checks.name: edit_template_safety
checks.description: editTemplate only if owner OR editors OR editorMarkets

checks.name: grant_view_template_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate only if (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets) AND customer restriction on targetUser

checks.name: grant_edit_template_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate only if (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets) AND targetUser must be internal if present

checks.name: remove_self_template_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only if (internal AND in viewers) OR (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets)

checks.name: remove_others_template_safety
checks.description: removeOthersAccessToTemplate only if owner OR editors OR editorMarkets

checks.name: floor_owner_edit_presentation
checks.description: Presentation owner MUST be able to edit their presentation

checks.name: floor_viewer_viewPresentation
checks.description: A user in resource.viewers MUST be able to view a presentation

checks.name: floor_viewerTeam_viewPresentation
checks.description: A user in resource.viewerTeams MUST be able to view a presentation

checks.name: floor_editorTeam_editPresentation
checks.description: A user in resource.editorTeams MUST be able to edit a presentation

checks.name: floor_internal_viewer_duplicate
checks.description: An internal user in resource.viewers MUST be able to duplicate a presentation

checks.name: floor_market_viewTemplate
checks.description: A user in resource.viewerMarkets MUST be able to view a template

checks.name: floor_owner_editTemplate
checks.description: Template owner MUST be able to edit their template

checks.name: liveness_viewPresentation
checks.description: viewPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_editPresentation
checks.description: editPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_viewTemplate
checks.description: viewTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_editTemplate
checks.description: editTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantViewAccessToPresentation
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantEditAccessToPresentation
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all

results.description: ExternalPrezViewActions on Presentation only if principal in resource.viewers OR principal in resource.viewerTeams OR resource.owner == principal OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorTeams (since PrezEditActions is a superset containing these actions)
duplicatePresentation only if (internal AND in viewers) OR owner OR in editors OR in editorTeams
editPresentation only if owner OR in editors OR in editorTeams
grantViewAccessToPresentation only if (owner OR editors OR editorTeams) AND customer sharing restriction respected
grantEditAccessToPresentation only if (owner OR editors OR editorTeams) AND target is internal
removeSelfAccessFromPresentation accessible via external view (viewers/viewerTeams), internal view (internal+viewers), or edit (owner/editors/editorTeams)
viewTemplate only if (in viewerMarkets) OR (internal AND in viewers) OR (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets)
duplicateTemplate same as viewTemplate ceiling
editTemplate only if owner OR editors OR editorMarkets
grantViewAccessToTemplate only if (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets) AND customer restriction on targetUser
grantEditAccessToTemplate only if (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets) AND targetUser must be internal if present
removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only if (internal AND in viewers) OR (owner OR editors OR editorMarkets)
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"removeSelfAccessFromTemplate", resource: Template::""
context: {}
entities: [
  Action::"grantViewAccessToTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Job::"internal",
  Action::"grantEditAccessToTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Job::"",
  Action::"grantEditAccessToPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Action::"removeSelfAccessFromPresentation" in [Action::"ExternalPrezViewActions", Action::"InternalPrezViewActions", Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Market::"",
  Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions",
  User::"A" {
    customerId: "A",
    job: Job::"",
  },
  Action::"MarketTemplateViewActions",
  Action::"TemplateEditActions",
  Action::"viewTemplate" in [Action::"MarketTemplateViewActions", Action::"TemplateEditActions", Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions"],
  Action::"editPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Action::"viewPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions", Action::"ExternalPrezViewActions", Action::"InternalPrezViewActions"],
  Template::"" {
    editorMarkets: [],
    editors: [],
    owner: User::"A",
    viewerMarkets: [Market::""],
    viewers: [User::""],
  },
  Action::"duplicateTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions", Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions", Action::"MarketTemplateViewActions"],
  Action::"removeOthersAccessToTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"ExternalPrezViewActions",
  User::"" {
    customerId: "A",
    job: Job::"",
  },
  Action::"removeSelfAccessFromTemplate" in [Action::"InternalTemplateViewActions", Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
  Action::"grantViewAccessToPresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions"],
  Action::"InternalPrezViewActions",
  Action::"PrezEditActions",
  Action::"duplicatePresentation" in [Action::"PrezEditActions", Action::"InternalPrezViewActions"],
  Action::"editTemplate" in [Action::"TemplateEditActions"],
]

results.description: removeOthersAccessToTemplate only if owner OR editors OR editorMarkets
Presentation owner MUST be able to edit their presentation
A user in resource.viewers MUST be able to view a presentation
A user in resource.viewerTeams MUST be able to view a presentation
A user in resource.editorTeams MUST be able to edit a presentation
An internal user in resource.viewers MUST be able to duplicate a presentation
A user in resource.viewerMarkets MUST be able to view a template
Template owner MUST be able to edit their template
viewPresentation is not trivially deny-all
editPresentation is not trivially deny-all
viewTemplate is not trivially deny-all
editTemplate is not trivially deny-all
grantViewAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all
grantEditAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all
